title: EquipmentDurabilityExtension
description: Mod to extend the durability value of equipment
body:
# About EquipmentDurabilityExtension

This mod allows the endurance value to be multiplied by 2^n+(n-1) instead of 2^n(1 ≤ n ≤ 10) times the number of materials consumed when creating equipment and tools.

## Config

By setting`Maximum durability value changed to 20 times.` to true, n can be extended to a maximum of 20.

## Tools available for production

- Shovel
- Pickaxe
- Axe
- Hoe
- Flint
- Shears

## Equipment available for production

- Sword
- Helmet
- Chestplate
- Leggings
- Boots
- Turtle shell (increases underwater breathing time)

## Materials available for production

- Stick
- Planks
- Cobblestone
- Iron Ingot
- Gold Ingot
- Diamond
- Netherite Ingot
- Leather
- Scute

## Recipe examples

- Example 1: Stone Shovel x1

  ![stone_shovel_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Www1FFVt/images/3415d2562845edc98e3f34ff31408240043ff0f8.png)

- Example 2: Stone Shovel x2

  ![stone_shovel2_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Www1FFVt/images/857c20c6cff3656cd694e06778826becb3adf120.png)
  ![stone_shovel2_recipe2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Www1FFVt/images/2a83f57d7102aadd1022dc5b77c15fca83bab986.png)

- Example 3: Diamond Hoe x10

  ![diamond_hoe10_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Www1FFVt/images/7e00b783e506a53f54a84eab1a413b0df7bb8469.png)

- Example 4: Planks x1

  ![planks1_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Www1FFVt/images/299aad599cd4c73ad5f507d162a88a0a8a2ec8c7.png)

- Example 5: Gold Ingot x6

  ![gold_ingot6_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Www1FFVt/images/90867492a3f14722ebb324e6872adb2d4cac949d.png)
